arg.name: config_package
arg.description: Package with Nav2 and SLAM configuration used in the scenario.

arg.name: robot_model
arg.description: Robot model used to choose the default Nav2 config files.

arg.name: nav2_config_file
arg.description: Optional Nav2 config file name without the .yaml suffix.

arg.name: slam_config_file
arg.description: SLAM Toolbox config file basename without the .yaml suffix.

arg.name: slam_mode
arg.description: SLAM Toolbox mode. Use 'mapping' to build/update a map or 'localization' to navigate using an existing pose graph.

arg.name: slam_map_file
arg.description: Serialized SLAM Toolbox pose graph basename for localization mode, without the .posegraph suffix.

arg.name: slam_map_start_pose
arg.description: Initial [x, y, yaw] pose used when loading a serialized pose graph in localization mode.

arg.name: scan_topic
arg.description: Optional LaserScan topic override. Defaults to /<robot_model>/lidar/scan.

arg.name: use_twist_mux
arg.description: Send Nav2 commands to twist_mux input instead of directly to the diff-drive controller.

let.name: selected_nav2_config_file
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var nav2_config_file)\' if \'$(var nav2_config_file)\' != \'\' else \'allie_nav2\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius_nav2\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe_nav2\'')
